slides.intent: Introduce the topic and define the acronym HDA
slides.layoutHint: Simple title slide with high-contrast text on a neutral background.
mustInclude: HDAs stands for High-Density Arrays, a critical technology in modern data storage.

slides.intent: Explain the practical function and benefits of HDAs

mustInclude: HDAs provide high-capacity storage solutions optimized for performance and density.
